name: Problem Reports Closed
description: Problem reports are tracked to closure — resolved, or deferred with recorded rationale.
rationale: DO-178C Table A-8 / §7.2.3: problem reporting records process non-compliances and product deficiencies, which are tracked to resolution or documented deferral.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
